title: strategy_008_bb_mean_reversion_rsi
author: manual-transcript-drop
summary_bullets: STRATEGY: Bollinger Band Mean Reversion with RSI Confirmation ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 1h MARKET CONDITION: Ranging/mean-reverting with established trend context TYPE: Mean reversion within trend CONCEPT: Trade bounces off Bollinger Band extremes but ONLY in the direction of the larger trend.
This prevents counter-trend mean reversion trades that get steamrolled.
RSI confirms the oversold/overbought condition is genuine.
Price targeting the middle band (SMA 20) gives a clear mechanical exit.

INDICATORS USED: - Bollinger Bands (period 20, std dev 2.0) - identify price extremes - RSI (period 14) - confirm oversold/overbought - EMA 200 - major trend filter (only trade with trend) - ATR (period 14) - stop loss sizing - SMA 20 - take profit target (Bollinger middle band) ENTRY LONG: 1.
Price closes at or below lower Bollinger Band 2.
Price is above EMA 200 (we are in an uptrend, this is a pullback) 4.
Previous candle was also below or touching lower BB (sustained touch, not spike) ENTRY SHORT: 1.
Price closes at or above upper Bollinger Band 2.

extracted_rules: INDICATORS USED: - Bollinger Bands (period 20, std dev 2.0) - identify price extremes - RSI (period 14) - confirm oversold/overbought - EMA 200 - major trend filter (only trade with trend) - ATR (period 14) - stop loss sizing - SMA 20 - take profit target (Bollinger middle band) ENTRY LONG: 1.

Previous candle was also above or touching upper BB EXIT RULES: - Take profit: Price reaches SMA 20 (middle Bollinger Band) - Stop loss: 2.0x ATR(14) beyond the Bollinger Band that triggered entry - Time stop: If middle band not reached within 12 candles (12 hours), exit at market - Breakeven: Move stop to entry once price moves 1.0 ATR in favor RISK MANAGEMENT: - Risk per trade: 0.75% of account (smaller size for mean reversion) - Max concurrent positions: 1 per asset - Skip entry if Bollinger

strategy_components.description: STRATEGY: Bollinger Band Mean Reversion with RSI Confirmation ASSET: BTC, ETH TIMEFRAME: 1h MARKET CONDITION: Ranging/mean-reverting with established trend context TYPE: Mean reversion within trend CONCEPT: Trade bounces
This prevents counter-trend mean reversion trades that get steamrolled.

INDICATORS USED: - Bollinger Bands (period 20, std dev 2.0) - identify price extremes - RSI (period 14) - confirm oversold/overbought - EMA 200 - major trend filter (only trade with trend) - ATR (period 14) - stop loss s
Price is above EMA 200 (we are in an uptrend, this is a pullback) 4.
Price is below EMA 200 (we are in a downtrend, this is a bounce) 4.
RSI confirmation filters out the touches that happen during momentum (which would continue through the band).

FALSIFIABLE HYPOTHESIS: BTC/ETH 1h pullbacks to lower Bollinger Band during uptrends (price > EMA 200) with RSI < 30 revert to the middle band within 12 candles at least 55% of the time, producing profit factor above 1.1

PARAMETER RANGES FOR SWEEP: - BB period: 15-25, step 5 - BB std dev: 1.5-2.5, step 0.25 - RSI threshold long: 25-35, step 5 - RSI threshold short: 65-75, step 5 - EMA trend filter: 100-200, step 50 - Stop ATR multiplier:

explicit_conditions: INDICATORS USED: - Bollinger Bands (period 20, std dev 2.0) - identify price extremes - RSI (period 14) - confirm oversold/overbought - EMA 200 - major trend filter (only trade with trend) - ATR (period 14) - stop loss sizing - SMA 20 - take profit target (Bollinger middle band) ENTRY LONG: 1.

Previous candle was also above or touching upper BB EXIT RULES: - Take profit: Price reaches SMA 20 (middle Bollinger Band) - Stop loss: 2.0x ATR(14) beyond the Bollinger Band that triggered entry - Time stop: If middle band not reached within 12 candles (12 hours), exit at market - Breakeven: Move stop to entry once price moves 1.0 ATR in favor RISK MANAGEMENT: - Risk per trade: 0.75% of account (smaller size for mean reversion) - Max concurrent positions: 1 per asset - Skip entry if Bollinger.
